entries.test: SessionLifecycleHooks > config-driven disable > disabled session-notification -> no notification on agent stop
entries.diagnosis: Flaky: DOMException TimeoutError under parallel test execution. Test passes consistently in isolation (15/15 pass). The timeout is a non-deterministic DOMException (code 23, TIMEOUT_ERR) triggered by resource contention when many test files run concurrently. HookChain.execute() calls Config.get() which lazily initializes Config.state — this involves Auth.all() file reads and potentially wellknown URL fetches. Under heavy parallel load, these async operations occasionally exceed an internal timeout threshold.
